description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and release. The build job runs on a matrix of Windows and Ubuntu environments with different Qt versions, checks out the repository, installs Qt, additional dependencies, creates a build environment, configures CMake, builds the project, runs tests, and validates desktop files. The release job depends on the build job, creates a release if the push event is a tag, and uploads the installer as an artifact.
